put.description:
Replaces an existing dashboard.

Requires the following permissions:
- `team-dashboards:Update`

schema.title: Replace dashboard request data structure
schema.description: This is a request sent to update an existing dashboard with new information

accessPolicy.description: JSON string representing the access policy for this dashboard. Defines granular permissions for users and groups.

requestId.description: Idempotency key for the replace request, used to prevent duplicate updates.

post.description:
Creates a new dashboard.

Requires the following permissions:
- `team-dashboards:Update`

schema.title: Create dashboard request data structure
schema.description: This is a request used to create a new custom dashboard

accessPolicy.description: JSON string representing the access policy for this dashboard. Defines granular permissions for users and groups.

get.description:
Get a list of all dashboards accessible.

Requires the following permissions:
- `team-dashboards:Read`

get.summary: Get a dashboard by URL slug
get.description:
Returns the dashboard associated with the specified slug.

Requires the following permissions:
- `team-dashboards:Read`

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: The URL slug identifying the dashboard to retrieve.

schema.description: The URL slug identifying the dashboard to retrieve.

get.description:
Returns the details of the specified dashboard.

Requires the following permissions:
- `team-dashboards:Read`

delete.description:
Deletes the dashboard with the specified ID.

Requires the following permissions:
- `team-dashboards:Update`

parameters.name: request_id
parameters.description: Optional client-supplied request identifier used to correlate the deletion request.

schema.description: Optional client-supplied request identifier used to correlate the deletion request.

put.description:
Sets the specified dashboard as the default.

Requires the following permissions:
- `team-dashboards:Update`

schema.title: Replace default dashboard request data structure
schema.description: This is a request to replace a default dashboard

requestId.description: Idempotency key for the replace default dashboard request, used to prevent duplicate operations.

post.summary: Assign a dashboard to a folder
post.description:
Assigns the dashboard to a folder.

Requires the following permissions:
- `team-dashboards:Update`

schema.title: Assign dashboard to folder request data structure
schema.description: This is a request for assigning a folder to a dashboard

folderId.description: The ID of the folder to assign the dashboard to. Set to null to assign to the root folder.

requestId.description: Idempotency key for the assign folder request, used to prevent duplicate operations.

put.description:
Pins the specified dashboard.

Requires the following permissions:
- `team-dashboards:Read`

parameters.name: request_id
parameters.description: Idempotency key for the pin request, used to prevent duplicate operations.

schema.description: Idempotency key for the pin request, used to prevent duplicate operations.

delete.description:
Unpins the specified dashboard.

Requires the following permissions:
- `team-dashboards:Read`

parameters.name: request_id
parameters.description: Idempotency key for the unpin request, used to prevent duplicate operations.

schema.description: Idempotency key for the unpin request, used to prevent duplicate operations.

ActionDefinitionCustomAction.description: Defines the behavior of a dashboard action, either a custom URL or a built-in template.

ActionDefinitionGoToDashboardAction.description: Defines the behavior of a dashboard action, either a custom URL or a built-in template.

AutoIntervalResolution.title: AutoIntervalResolution
AutoIntervalResolution.description: Automatic interval resolution that calculates optimal time buckets based on the widget width, time range, and specified constraints.

maximumDataPoints.description: Maximum number of data points to display. The calculated interval ensures this limit is not exceeded.

minimumInterval.description: Minimum interval duration. The calculated interval will not be smaller than this value.

BarChart.title: BarChart
BarChart.description: BarChart represents the configuration of a vertical bar chart widget.

colorScheme.description: Applied color scheme, one of the predefined values

customUnit.description: Custom unit (requires to have unit field set to custom to take effect)

decimal.description: Number indicating the decimal precision of the numeric values, within range 0-15

decimalPrecision.description: Whether to render numeric value without abbreviation

groupNameTemplate.description: Custom template name for a bar group, can contain variables

hashColors.description: Whether to ignore color scheme and derive colors from algorithm

maxBarsPerChart.description: Maximum number of bars on a chart

yAxisMax.description: Number indicating the upper band for y axis

yAxisMin.description: Number indicating the lower band for y axis

DataprimeSource.Strategy.Duration.description: Duration strategy: uses a start timestamp and a duration field to define the annotation span.

DataprimeSource.Strategy.Instant.description: Instant snapshot strategy: uses a single timestamp field to define the annotation point.

DataprimeSource.Strategy.Range.description: Range strategy: uses start and end timestamp fields to define the annotation span.

DataprimeSourceStrategyDurationVariant.description: Determines the time strategy for fetching Dataprime results (instant snapshot, fixed range, or sliding window).

DataprimeSourceStrategyInstantVariant.description: Determines the time strategy for fetching Dataprime results (instant snapshot, fixed range, or sliding window).

DataprimeSourceStrategyRangeVariant.description: Determines the time strategy for fetching Dataprime results (instant snapshot, fixed range, or sliding window).

EventRecurrenceSource.description: Annotation source driven by recurring calendar events such as weekly deployments or maintenance windows.

EventRecurrenceSource.Strategy.Duration.description: Renders the recurrence event as a sliding window starting at the configured hour and spanning the given duration.

EventRecurrenceSource.Strategy.Instant.description: Renders the recurrence event as an instant snapshot at the configured start hour.

EventRecurrenceSourceStrategyDurationVar.description: Determines how the recurrence event is rendered: as an instant point or a sliding window duration.

EventRecurrenceSourceStrategyInstantVari.description: Determines how the recurrence event is rendered: as an instant point or a sliding window duration.

showName.description: Whether to show the name of slice in the label

showPercentage.description: Whether to show percentage value of slice in the label

showValue.description: Whether to show value of slice in the label

Visualization.SortOrder.title: SortOrder
Visualization.SortOrder.description: Sort order with direction and strategy - either by category or by query value

externalDocs.description: Find out more about creating dashboard widgets in our documentation.

Widget.title: Widget
Widget.description: This data structure represents a dashboard widget.

WidgetReference.title: WidgetReference
WidgetReference.description: Reference to a widget from another dashboard

dashboardId.description: Dashboard ID containing the referenced widget

XAxisByTime.title: XAxisByTime
XAxisByTime.description: X axis by time configuration. (deprecated, use time_buckets instead)

bucketsPresented.description: How many buckets to present in the selected timeframe (deprecated)

interval.description: Interval of value sampling, i.e. every 5 minutes, every 1 second and so on (deprecated)

common.Threshold.title: Threshold
common.Threshold.description: Definition of a single gauge threshold

from.description: Minimum bound value of the threshold

externalDocs.description: Discover how to filter and query data in Custom Dashboards by exploring our documentation.

filters.Filter.title: Filter
filters.Filter.description: This data structure represents the configuration for filtering data on the dashboard.

collapsed.description: Indicates if the filter's UI representation should be collapsed or expanded.

displayName.description: A display name for the filter

enabled.description: Indicates if the filter is currently enabled or not.

customUnit.description: Custom unit (requires to have unit field set as 'custom' to take effect)

decimal.description: Number indicating the decimal precision of the numeric values, within range 0-15

decimalPrecision.description: Whether to render numeric value without abbreviation

displaySeriesName.description: (multigauge display only) Whether to show the series names above the value

max.description: A maximum gauge value used in percentage threshold calculation and for visual value representation

min.description: A minimum gauge value used in percentage threshold calculation and for visual value representation

showInnerArc.description: Whether to show the inner arc of gauge which graphically represents the value

showOuterArc.description: Whether to show the outer arc of gauge which graphically represents the min/max range

thresholds.description: List of value thresholds, each with a certain color and an optional name label

colorScheme.description: Applied color scheme, one of the predefined values

customUnit.description: Custom unit (requires the unit field to be set to custom to take effect)

decimal.description: Number indicating the decimal precision of the numeric values, within range 0-15

decimalPrecision.description: Whether to render numeric value without abbreviation

groupNameTemplate.description: Custom template name for a group, can contain variables

hashColors.description: Whether to ignore color scheme and derive colors from algorithm

maxSlicesPerChart.description: Maximum number of slices on a chart

minSlicePercentage.description: Minimum percentage threshold for slices to be displayed

showLegend.description: Indicates whether to display the legend

showTotal.description: Whether to show the total amount as a title

showName.description: Whether to show the name of slice in the label

showPercentage.description: Whether to show percentage value of slice in the label

showValue.description: Whether to show value of slice in the label
